ARG.blurb: Drama, flair, and at least one player you'll argue about.
ARG.fact: Reigning champions — and they will remind you.

ESP.blurb: Tiki-taka merchants who pass you into a coma, then score.
ESP.fact: World champions in 2010 — their only title, somehow.

FRA.blurb: Ludicrous talent, occasional implosion. Box office either way.

POR.blurb: Golden generation, golden boots, golden-hour selfies.
POR.fact: European champions in 2016 against the odds.

BRA.blurb: Joga bonito until it isn't. Five stars, endless pressure.

MAR.blurb: Sort of African champions, kind of.
MAR.fact: First African side to reach a World Cup semi-final (2022).

NED.blurb: Less than the sum of their parts.
NED.fact: Three lost finals — the nearly-men of greatness.

BEL.blurb: The golden generation that keeps not-quite winning.
BEL.fact: Ranked world No.1 for ages without a trophy.

GER.fact: Four-time winners — currently allergic to the knockouts.

CRO.blurb: A midfield from the heavens, legs from a museum.
CRO.fact: Reached the 2018 final with a tiny population.

COL.blurb: Rhythm, ruthlessness, and a corner-flag dance or two.
COL.fact: Once scored maybe the best team goal in World Cup history.

MEX.blurb: The great escape artists of the group stage.
MEX.fact: Have reached the knockouts an exhausting number of times.

SEN.blurb: Pace, power, and the loudest fans in the building.
SEN.fact: Africa's reigning continental kings on their day.

URY.blurb: Tiny nation, enormous bite. Never, ever a soft draw.
URY.fact: Won the very first World Cup in 1930.

USA.blurb: Young, athletic, and playing the tournament at home.
USA.fact: Co-hosts — expectation has never been higher.

JPN.blurb: Crisp, disciplined, and giant-killers when it matters.
JPN.fact: Have knocked out Germany and Spain on the same run.

SUI.blurb: Punctual, organised, quietly ruins big teams' tournaments.
SUI.fact: Masters of the goalless knockout heartbreak.

IRN.blurb: Streetwise, stubborn and a regular qualifier.

TUR.fact: Came third in 2002, then vanished for over two decades.

ECU.blurb: Altitude specialists who travel surprisingly well.
ECU.fact: Almost unbeatable in thin Quito air.

AUT.blurb: Press, press, press, concede, go home.
AUT.fact: Gegenpressing poster boys who flatter to deceive.

KOR.blurb: Run until they literally cannot run anymore.

AUS.blurb: Keep your shrimps off their barbie.
AUS.fact: Travel further than anyone just to qualify.

ALG.blurb: Technical, fiery, and dangerous on their day.

EGY.blurb: Record continental kings with one very famous No.10.

CAN.blurb: Quick, fearless co-hosts on the rise.
CAN.fact: Co-hosting their first home World Cup.

NOR.blurb: Big, blond, and surprisingly fun to watch this time.
NOR.fact: Fjords, oil money, and unfairly tall strikers.

CIV.blurb: Power, flair and African champions on home soil recently.
CIV.fact: Won the 2023 Cup of Nations from nowhere.

PAN.blurb: Tiny nation, enormous heart, dangerous on the break.
PAN.fact: Their first-ever World Cup goal sparked national delirium.

SWE.blurb: Tall, tidy and a total nuisance at set-pieces.
SWE.fact: Knocked the Netherlands out to even get here, once.

CZE.fact: Finally got the country name down to one snappy word.

PAR.blurb: Gritty, physical and never a pleasant afternoon.
PAR.fact: Famous for grinding out the ugliest of results.

SCO.blurb: The fans alone are worth the entry fee.
SCO.fact: Bring the best away support in world football.

COD.fact: Last appeared in 1974 under the name Zaire.

TUN.fact: Regular qualifiers who love a famous scalp.

UZB.blurb: The fairytale debutants nobody can spell-check.
UZB.fact: On a first-ever World Cup run — pure house money.

QAT.blurb: Asian champions hoping to repay a host's faith.
QAT.fact: Won the 2019 Asian Cup before hosting in 2022.

IRQ.blurb: Took the very last playoff spot.
IRQ.fact: Last seen at a World Cup in 1986.

RSA.blurb: Quick, joyful, and overdue a deep run.
RSA.fact: Hosted the whole thing back in 2010.

KSA.blurb: Capable of a result that stops the planet.
KSA.fact: Beat the eventual champions in the 2022 group stage.

JOR.fact: Beat South Korea in the 2023 Asian Cup.

BIH.fact: Beat Italy on penalties to knock the four-time champions out.

CPV.blurb: Blue Sharks in first World Cup.
CPV.fact: More players born in Rotterdam than anywhere else.

GHA.blurb: Your dark horse with actual giddy-up. The neutral's favourite.
GHA.fact: Named after the Black Star of Pan-Africanism.

CUW.fact: Smallest nation to ever qualify for a World Cup.

NZL.blurb: Honest, organised and never beaten easily.
NZL.fact: Went unbeaten at a World Cup and still went home (2010). Pass-Agg.
